summary: This document outlines critical issues identified during a user testing session for the AI phone agent, specifically focusing on transcription inaccuracies and excessive conversational repetition. It details specific examples where the AI misheard medication names and repeated closing phrases over twenty times. The content provides essential feedback on product quality and AI reliability for healthcare interactions.
